content: Hello! Great to have you here. I'm Rohan, an AI Engineer focused on building innovative AI utilities and exploring prompt engineering. How can I assist you today?

I've been involved in building various AI utilities and working on prompt engineering projects, especially in areas like AI-driven video captioning and Visual Question Answering. Currently, I’m focused on developing tools that can make AI deployment faster and more efficient. If you're interested, I can share more about specific projects or my experience—just let me know!
Sure! You can find my work on GitHub here: [github.com/rohanjangala](https://github.com/rohanjangala). Feel free to check out my projects and repositories there.
